basic_details.job_title: IIM Raipur Research Associate / Data Analyst/Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Raipur (IIM Raipur) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Associate / Data Analyst/Project Scientist Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree in Economics, Statistics, Data Analytics, Operations Research, Mathematics, Business Analytics, or equivalent disciplines from a recognized/reputed or university, with First Class or equivalent grade and a consistently strong academic record throughout.
qualification.details: Master’s degree in Economics, Statistics, Data Analytics, Operations Research, Mathematics, Business Analytics, or equivalent disciplines from a recognized/reputed or university, with First Class or equivalent grade and a consistently strong academic record throughout.

selection_process: Written test and/or personal interview of the shortlisted candidates only
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Raipur to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIM Raipur recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the IIM Raipur Research Associate / Data Analyst/Project Scientist posts is 03 June 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master’s degree in Economics, Statistics, Data Analytics, Operations Research, Mathematics, Business Analytics, or equivalent disciplines from a recognized university with a First Class or equivalent grade.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Research Associate / Data Analyst/Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government rules and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for this role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Research Associate / Data Analyst/Project Scientist.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a written test and/or a personal interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIM Raipur located?
faq.answer: IIM Raipur is located in Raipur, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 493661.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for this job?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official website of IIM Raipur or via the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section before the last date.
